SEARCH
Package com.nib.grammars

Class IkjeftParserBaseListener

java.lang.Object
com.nib.grammars.IkjeftParserBaseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
IkjeftParserListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
public class IkjeftParserBaseListener extends Object implements IkjeftParserListener
This class provides an empty implementation of IkjeftParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

    • enterMain

      public void enterMain(IkjeftParser.MainContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by IkjeftParser.main().

      The default implementation does nothing.

      ctx - the parse tree
